Locked CVX
Voting Incentives
Last Round Incentives APR on Votium
17.02%

Locked CVX gives voting weight for Curve & Prisma Emissions Weight Votes, among a lot of other things listed on the “Lock CVX” page.

Those Curve & Prisma Emissions Weight Votes take place every two weeks, and receive external incentives through the third-party Votium platform: when you vote for some pools, you can earn incentives. Head to Votium to learn more!

Open Votium.app Open Llama Airforce dashboard
